dashboard.noEvents: No events scheduled. Add your first event!
dashboard.unmarkMsg: Do you want to unmark "{{activity}}"? This only works if you completed it manually.
dashboard.markMsg: Do you want to mark "{{activity}}" as completed without tracking GPS or time?
dashboard.successPlan: Success! A 52-week macrocycle has been generated and saved. Check your Calendar tab.
dashboard.errorPlan: Could not generate the plan with AI.
dashboard.prefsNeededMsg: Before generating your first plan, please fill out your preferences so the AI can adapt it perfectly to you.

modals.geminiDesc: To generate your training plan, we need your Google Gemini API Key. It will be securely stored on your device.
modals.aiPrefsDesc: Adjust your preferences before generating the plan.
modals.sessionTimingDesc: Helps the AI decide whether to place sessions in the morning, evening, or split them by intensity.
modals.amTimeBudgetDesc: Select how many minutes you could realistically train in the morning on a normal day.
modals.pmTimeBudgetDesc: Select how many minutes you could realistically train in the afternoon or evening on a normal day.
modals.restDayDesc: If one day is usually best for rest, the AI will take it into account.

calendarScreen.title: Your Plan
calendarScreen.noTraining: Strategic rest day. Recover your energy for the next battle!
calendarScreen.noEventsExport: Your plan is empty. Generate one first!
calendarScreen.exportError: Oops, something went wrong exporting your plan.
calendarScreen.cantShare: Your device doesn't support sharing this file.
calendarScreen.importError: Could not read the calendar file.

tracker.title: Tracker
tracker.errorLoc: No location permissions for this activity.
tracker.saved: Your workout has been saved to the history.
tracker.notSaved: The workout was too short and wasn't saved.
tracker.finishAsk: Do you want to finish this workout?

history.title: History
history.noWorkouts: No workouts recorded yet. Go to Tracker and save your first activity.

raceWeek.todayIsRace: TODAY IS THE DAY! GO SMASH IT: {{event}}
raceWeek.raceTips: Trust your training. Stay hydrated, eat your carbs, and visualize the finish line.
raceWeek.raceTipsToday: Remember your pacing strategy. You've got this!
